## Details

- **Contributors:** <optional>
  <!-- List additional contributors involved in this use case or submission (one per line). -->

- **Keywords:** <optional>
  <!-- Add keywords (one per line). -->

- **Methodology Type:** <Computational / Experimental / Mixed/Hybrid>

- **Specific Technique:** <optional>
  <!-- Specify the main technique or method used in this use case. -->

- **Data Size:** <optional>
  <!-- Approximate size of the dataset associated with this use case. -->

## References

- **Publication:** <optional>
  <!-- Provide the DOI or link to a publication related to this use case (if available). -->

- **Repository:** <optional>
  <!-- Provide a link to the source code repository associated with this use case (e.g., GitHub, GitLab). -->

- **Dataset:** <optional>
  <!-- Provide a link to the dataset associated with this use case (e.g., DOI, NOMAD upload or entry ID) -->

- **Funding:** <optional>
  <!-- Grant number or agency. -->

- **Media:** <optional>
  <!-- Provide a link to a video, animation, or GIF illustrating the use case (optional). -->

## Metrics

- **Estimated Active Users:** <optional>
  <!-- Approximate number of users currently using or interacting with this tool, dataset, or use case. -->

- **Downloads:** <optional>
  <!-- Number of downloads of the associated dataset or software (if known). -->
